---
title: "Daily Commit"
author: "Gaby Hoover"
format: pdf
---

## My Daily Commit Diary

##### Thursday, Feb 12, 2026

I like dogs. I miss my dog right now. Shay please visit me. 

I am ready for a new commitment!! 

hiiiiiii from github! by the end of the week, github will work for everyone :))) (i hope)
